---
title: "Projects"
description: "Projects, software, datasets, and demos from CogDyn Lab"
---

## Current projects

### Project title

Briefly describe the research question, methods, collaborators, and outputs.

- Status: ongoing
- People: Name, Name
- Links: paper / code / data / demo

### Project title

Briefly describe the project in one or two paragraphs.

- Status: ongoing
- People: Name, Name
- Links: paper / code / data / demo

## Software and datasets

- **Repository name** — one-sentence description. [GitHub](https://github.com/cogdynlab)
- **Dataset name** — one-sentence description. DOI or OSF link.
